hypothesis: If FREED++ optimizes a dual objective of maximizing pharmacophoric similarity to a reference set of 53 estrogen receptor antagonists/degraders while minimizing structural similarity to promote novelty, then the generated molecules will show improved docking scores against the estrogen receptor target (PDB ID: 8AWG) and higher novelty against public databases (ChEMBL, ZINC, PubChem) without sacrificing QED and SA, compared to baseline QED docking.
